allow: Bash(node -e "const {YahooFinance: YF} = require\(''''yahoo-finance2''''\); const yf = new YF\(\); yf.quoteSummary\(''''AAPL'''', {modules: [''''financialData'''',''''defaultKeyStatistics'''',''''incomeStatementHistory'''',''''balanceSheetHistory'''',''''summaryProfile'''']}\).then\(d => { const j = JSON.stringify\(d, null, 2\); require\(''''fs''''\).writeFileSync\(''''/tmp/aapl_fundamentals.json'''', j\); console.log\(''''done, size:'''', j.length\) }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\)")
